specific_question: During Q3 2025, what types of IT requests take the longest for employees to set up new email signatures across devices?
answer: According to Lee’s Market internal IT logs from Q3 2025, configuration requests for email signatures across multiple devices accounted for 18% of all IT setup delays, with most issues occurring among employees managing three or more linked accounts.
dr_question: By Q3 2026, how can Lee’s Market expand and optimize its IT self-service capabilities to reduce service desk dependency, accelerate resolution times, and improve both employee and customer experience across all stores?
